# Support

## Questions and Setup

Open a GitHub Discussion after Discussions are enabled. Until then, use a
feature request and clearly label it as a setup question.

## Bugs

Use the bug report form with a sanitized report, MergeWarden version, Action or
CLI invocation, and expected behavior. Never include tokens or private
repository content.

## Policy Feedback

Use the policy feedback form for false positives, missing evidence, severity
tuning, and adoption experience. A minimal public fixture is especially useful.

## Security

Do not file a public issue. Use GitHub private vulnerability reporting from the
Security tab as described in [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).
